name: Luby's Shredded Carrots
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Whole (or 1.6 lbs peeled) shredded carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak raisins in water or pineapple juice to plump, then drain.
2. Combine the soaked raisins, shredded carrots, crushed pineapple, mayonnaise, and powdered sugar.
3. Chill until ready to serve.
